Heading:
The Bridge Between
Science & Somatics
BodyText1: We blend the rigorous empirical findings of forest medicine with deep, intuitive practices of somatic experiencing.
BodyText2: Our approach moves beyond simply being outdoors. It creates a structured, restorative container that supports nervous system regulation and deeper ecological belonging.
QuoteText: The nervous system does not end at the skin; it is in constant conversation with the ecosystem it inhabits.
